parameters.name: AwsAccount
parameters.label: AWS Account
parameters.query:
AWSSecurityHubFindings
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| distinct AwsAccountId
| sort by AwsAccountId asc

parameters.name: AwsRegion
parameters.label: AWS Region
parameters.query:
AWSSecurityHubFindings
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend Region = tostring(AwsRegion)
| distinct Region
| sort by Region asc

parameters.name: ComplianceStatus
parameters.label: Compliance Status
parameters.query:
AWSSecurityHubFindings
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| distinct ComplianceStatus
| sort by ComplianceStatus asc

content.query:
AWSSecurityHubFindings
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AwsAccountId in ({AwsAccount}) or '*' in ({AwsAccount})
| where AwsRegion in ({AwsRegion}) or '*' in ({AwsRegion})
| where ComplianceStatus in ({ComplianceStatus}) or '*' in ({ComplianceStatus})
| where RecordState == "ACTIVE"
| summarize TotalFindings = count()
content.title: Total Active Findings

content.query:
AWSSecurityHubFindings
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AwsAccountId in ({AwsAccount}) or '*' in ({AwsAccount})
| where AwsRegion in ({AwsRegion}) or '*' in ({AwsRegion})
| where ComplianceStatus in ({ComplianceStatus}) or '*' in ({ComplianceStatus})
| where RecordState == "ACTIVE" and ComplianceStatus == "FAILED"
| where FindingProviderFieldsSeverityLabel in ("CRITICAL", "HIGH")
| summarize CriticalHighFindings = count()
content.title: Critical & High Severity

content.query:
AWSSecurityHubFindings
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AwsAccountId in ({AwsAccount}) or '*' in ({AwsAccount})
| where AwsRegion in ({AwsRegion}) or '*' in ({AwsRegion})
| where ComplianceStatus in ({ComplianceStatus}) or '*' in ({ComplianceStatus})
| where RecordState == "ACTIVE" and ComplianceStatus == "FAILED"
| summarize FailedFindings = count()
content.title: Failed Compliance Checks

content.query:
AWSSecurityHubFindings
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AwsAccountId in ({AwsAccount}) or '*' in ({AwsAccount})
| where AwsRegion in ({AwsRegion}) or '*' in ({AwsRegion})
| where ComplianceStatus in ({ComplianceStatus}) or '*' in ({ComplianceStatus})
| where RecordState == "ACTIVE"
| distinct AwsAccountId
| summarize UniqueAccounts = count()
content.title: AWS Accounts Monitored

content.query:
AWSSecurityHubFindings
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AwsAccountId in ({AwsAccount}) or '*' in ({AwsAccount})
| where AwsRegion in ({AwsRegion}) or '*' in ({AwsRegion})
| where ComplianceStatus in ({ComplianceStatus}) or '*' in ({ComplianceStatus})
| where RecordState == "ACTIVE" and ComplianceStatus == "FAILED"
| extend SecurityControlId = tostring(ComplianceSecurityControlId)
| where isnotempty(SecurityControlId)
| distinct SecurityControlId
| summarize FailingControls = count()
content.title: Failing Security Controls

content.query:
AWSSecurityHubFindings
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AwsAccountId in ({AwsAccount}) or '*' in ({AwsAccount})
| where AwsRegion in ({AwsRegion}) or '*' in ({AwsRegion})
| where ComplianceStatus in ({ComplianceStatus}) or '*' in ({ComplianceStatus})
| where RecordState == "ACTIVE"
| extend SeverityLabel = tostring(FindingProviderFieldsSeverityLabel)
| summarize Count = count() by SeverityLabel
| sort by Count desc
content.title: Findings Distribution by Severity

content.query:
AWSSecurityHubFindings
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AwsAccountId in ({AwsAccount}) or '*' in ({AwsAccount})
| where AwsRegion in ({AwsRegion}) or '*' in ({AwsRegion})
| where ComplianceStatus in ({ComplianceStatus}) or '*' in ({ComplianceStatus})
| where RecordState == "ACTIVE"
| summarize Count = count() by ComplianceStatus
| sort by Count desc
content.title: Compliance Status Distribution

content.query:
AWSSecurityHubFindings
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AwsAccountId in ({AwsAccount}) or '*' in ({AwsAccount})
| where AwsRegion in ({AwsRegion}) or '*' in ({AwsRegion})
| where ComplianceStatus in ({ComplianceStatus}) or '*' in ({ComplianceStatus})
| where RecordState == "ACTIVE"
| extend Region = tostring(AwsRegion)
| summarize Count = count() by Region
| top 10 by Count desc
content.title: Top 10 Regions by Finding Count

content.query:
AWSSecurityHubFindings
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AwsAccountId in ({AwsAccount}) or '*' in ({AwsAccount})
| where AwsRegion in ({AwsRegion}) or '*' in ({AwsRegion})
| where ComplianceStatus in ({ComplianceStatus}) or '*' in ({ComplianceStatus})
| where RecordState == "ACTIVE"
| extend SeverityLabel = tostring(FindingProviderFieldsSeverityLabel)
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), SeverityLabel
| sort by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Findings Trend Over Time by Severity

content.query:
AWSSecurityHubFindings
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AwsAccountId in ({AwsAccount}) or '*' in ({AwsAccount})
| where AwsRegion in ({AwsRegion}) or '*' in ({AwsRegion})
| where ComplianceStatus in ({ComplianceStatus}) or '*' in ({ComplianceStatus})
| where RecordState == "ACTIVE"
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), ComplianceStatus
| sort by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Compliance Status Trend Over Time

content.query:
AWSSecurityHubFindings
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AwsAccountId in ({AwsAccount}) or '*' in ({AwsAccount})
| where AwsRegion in ({AwsRegion}) or '*' in ({AwsRegion})
| where ComplianceStatus in ({ComplianceStatus}) or '*' in ({ComplianceStatus})
| where RecordState == "ACTIVE" and ComplianceStatus == "FAILED"
| extend SecurityControlId = tostring(ComplianceSecurityControlId)
| extend SeverityLabel = tostring(FindingProviderFieldsSeverityLabel)
| summarize 
    FindingCount = count(),
    Critical = countif(SeverityLabel == "CRITICAL"),
    High = countif(SeverityLabel == "HIGH"),
    Medium = countif(SeverityLabel == "MEDIUM"),
    Low = countif(SeverityLabel == "LOW"),
    AffectedAccounts = dcount(AwsAccountId),
    SampleTitle = any(AwsSecurityFindingTitle)
    by SecurityControlId
| top 20 by FindingCount desc
| project SecurityControlId, SampleTitle, FindingCount, Critical, High, Medium, Low, AffectedAccounts
| sort by FindingCount desc
content.title: Top 20 Failing Security Controls

content.query:
AWSSecurityHubFindings
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AwsAccountId in ({AwsAccount}) or '*' in ({AwsAccount})
| where AwsRegion in ({AwsRegion}) or '*' in ({AwsRegion})
| where ComplianceStatus in ({ComplianceStatus}) or '*' in ({ComplianceStatus})
| where RecordState == "ACTIVE"
| extend SeverityLabel = tostring(FindingProviderFieldsSeverityLabel)
| summarize 
    TotalFindings = count(),
    Critical = countif(SeverityLabel == "CRITICAL"),
    High = countif(SeverityLabel == "HIGH"),
    Medium = countif(SeverityLabel == "MEDIUM"),
    Low = countif(SeverityLabel == "LOW"),
    Failed = countif(ComplianceStatus == "FAILED"),
    Passed = countif(ComplianceStatus == "PASSED"),
    UniqueRegions = dcount(AwsRegion)
    by AwsAccountId
| extend ComplianceRate = round((Passed * 100.0) / (Passed + Failed), 2)
| project AwsAccountId, TotalFindings, Critical, High, Medium, Low, Failed, Passed, ComplianceRate, UniqueRegions
| sort by TotalFindings desc
content.title: AWS Account Security Posture Summary

content.query:
AWSSecurityHubFindings
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AwsAccountId in ({AwsAccount}) or '*' in ({AwsAccount})
| where AwsRegion in ({AwsRegion}) or '*' in ({AwsRegion})
| where ComplianceStatus in ({ComplianceStatus}) or '*' in ({ComplianceStatus})
| where RecordState == "ACTIVE"
| mv-expand ComplianceRelatedRequirements
| extend Standard = tostring(ComplianceRelatedRequirements)
| where isnotempty(Standard)
| extend StandardFamily = case(
    Standard contains "CIS", "CIS AWS Foundations",
    Standard contains "NIST", "NIST 800-53",
    Standard contains "PCI", "PCI DSS",
    Standard contains "ISO", "ISO 27001",
    Standard contains "HIPAA", "HIPAA",
    Standard contains "SOC", "SOC 2",
    "Other")
| summarize 
    TotalFindings = count(),
    Failed = countif(ComplianceStatus == "FAILED"),
    Passed = countif(ComplianceStatus == "PASSED")
    by StandardFamily
| extend ComplianceRate = round((Passed * 100.0) / (Passed + Failed), 2)
| project StandardFamily, TotalFindings, Failed, Passed, ComplianceRate
| sort by TotalFindings desc
content.title: Compliance by Security Standard

content.query:
AWSSecurityHubFindings
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AwsAccountId in ({AwsAccount}) or '*' in ({AwsAccount})
| where AwsRegion in ({AwsRegion}) or '*' in ({AwsRegion})
| where ComplianceStatus in ({ComplianceStatus}) or '*' in ({ComplianceStatus})
| where RecordState == "ACTIVE"
| mv-expand ComplianceRelatedRequirements
| extend Standard = tostring(ComplianceRelatedRequirements)
| where isnotempty(Standard)
| extend StandardFamily = case(
    Standard contains "CIS", "CIS AWS Foundations",
    Standard contains "NIST", "NIST 800-53",
    Standard contains "PCI", "PCI DSS",
    Standard contains "ISO", "ISO 27001",
    Standard contains "HIPAA", "HIPAA",
    Standard contains "SOC", "SOC 2",
    "Other")
| where ComplianceStatus == "FAILED"
| summarize FailedCount = count() by StandardFamily
| sort by FailedCount desc
content.title: Failed Findings by Compliance Standard

content.query:
AWSSecurityHubFindings
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AwsAccountId in ({AwsAccount}) or '*' in ({AwsAccount})
| where AwsRegion in ({AwsRegion}) or '*' in ({AwsRegion})
| where ComplianceStatus in ({ComplianceStatus}) or '*' in ({ComplianceStatus})
| where RecordState == "ACTIVE"
| extend ResourceType = tostring(Resources[0].Type)
| where isnotempty(ResourceType)
| extend SeverityLabel = tostring(FindingProviderFieldsSeverityLabel)
| summarize 
    TotalFindings = count(),
    Critical = countif(SeverityLabel == "CRITICAL"),
    High = countif(SeverityLabel == "HIGH"),
    Medium = countif(SeverityLabel == "MEDIUM"),
    Low = countif(SeverityLabel == "LOW"),
    Failed = countif(ComplianceStatus == "FAILED"),
    UniqueResources = dcount(tostring(Resources[0].Id))
    by ResourceType
| top 15 by TotalFindings desc
| project ResourceType, TotalFindings, Critical, High, Medium, Low, Failed, UniqueResources
| sort by TotalFindings desc
content.title: Top 15 Resource Types with Findings

content.query:
AWSSecurityHubFindings
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AwsAccountId in ({AwsAccount}) or '*' in ({AwsAccount})
| where AwsRegion in ({AwsRegion}) or '*' in ({AwsRegion})
| where ComplianceStatus in ({ComplianceStatus}) or '*' in ({ComplianceStatus})
| where RecordState == "ACTIVE" and ComplianceStatus == "FAILED"
| extend 
    SecurityControlId = tostring(ComplianceSecurityControlId),
    SeverityLabel = tostring(FindingProviderFieldsSeverityLabel),
    ResourceType = tostring(Resources[0].Type),
    ResourceId = tostring(Resources[0].Id)
| project 
    TimeGenerated,
    AwsAccountId,
    AwsRegion,
    SecurityControlId,
    SeverityLabel,
    AwsSecurityFindingTitle,
    ResourceType,
    ResourceId,
    ComplianceStatus,
    AwsSecurityFindingId
| top 100 by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Latest 100 Failed Findings (Detailed View)

content.query:
AWSSecurityHubFindings
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AwsAccountId in ({AwsAccount}) or '*' in ({AwsAccount})
| where AwsRegion in ({AwsRegion}) or '*' in ({AwsRegion})
| where ComplianceStatus in ({ComplianceStatus}) or '*' in ({ComplianceStatus})
| where RecordState == "ACTIVE"
| extend SecurityControlId = tostring(ComplianceSecurityControlId)
| where SecurityControlId startswith "IAM."
| extend SeverityLabel = tostring(FindingProviderFieldsSeverityLabel)
| summarize 
    Count = count(),
    Critical = countif(SeverityLabel == "CRITICAL"),
    High = countif(SeverityLabel == "HIGH"),
    Medium = countif(SeverityLabel == "MEDIUM"),
    Failed = countif(ComplianceStatus == "FAILED"),
    SampleTitle = any(AwsSecurityFindingTitle)
    by SecurityControlId
| project SecurityControlId, SampleTitle, Count, Critical, High, Medium, Failed
| sort by Count desc
content.title: IAM Security Control Findings

content.query:
AWSSecurityHubFindings
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AwsAccountId in ({AwsAccount}) or '*' in ({AwsAccount})
| where AwsRegion in ({AwsRegion}) or '*' in ({AwsRegion})
| where ComplianceStatus in ({ComplianceStatus}) or '*' in ({ComplianceStatus})
| where RecordState == "ACTIVE"
| extend SecurityControlId = tostring(ComplianceSecurityControlId)
| where SecurityControlId startswith "EC2."
| extend SeverityLabel = tostring(FindingProviderFieldsSeverityLabel)
| summarize 
    Count = count(),
    Critical = countif(SeverityLabel == "CRITICAL"),
    High = countif(SeverityLabel == "HIGH"),
    Medium = countif(SeverityLabel == "MEDIUM"),
    Failed = countif(ComplianceStatus == "FAILED"),
    SampleTitle = any(AwsSecurityFindingTitle)
    by SecurityControlId
| project SecurityControlId, SampleTitle, Count, Critical, High, Medium, Failed
| sort by Count desc
content.title: EC2 Security Control Findings
